acceptance_criteria: summaries generate once and re-use from cache on unchanged clusters
query output contains the community block when summaries exist
fully skipped without --semantic
description: Extend the semantic (opt-in) path: after clustering, generate one summary node per community (workforce backend via tools/lib/workforce, local/no-key → skip with warning), store as rationale_for edges to the community members, cache by cluster content hash under graphify-out/summaries/. At query time include matching community summaries in the traversal result block so the synthesizing agent reads map-level context first.
title: GraphRAG community summaries consulted at query time

acceptance_criteria: index builds on the fixture portfolio graph with ollama OR transformers backend
a synonym query ('auth login flow' vs node labeled session-signin) hits via re-rank where substring alone misses
absence of any local embedder degrades gracefully to substring with one warning line
description: New tools/graph/embeddings.mjs. BUILD: read graphify-out/graph.json nodes (label + up to 256 chars of source snippet), embed local-first — try ollama http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/embeddings model nomic-embed-text, else lazy-import @xenova/transformers all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (optionalDependency), else exit with a clear 'no local embedder' warning; write float32 matrix + ids to graphify-out/embeddings/{vectors.bin,ids.jsonl,meta.json}. QUERY: embed the query, cosine top-50, merge+re-rank with the existing substring/IDF hits, feed the merged node set into the existing traversal. Wire into sma-graphify commandQuery: on index presence, re-rank by default; --no-semantic-rank opts out. Never a paid API by default (cost policy).
title: Embedding index + semantic re-rank for graphify query

acceptance_criteria: query across two tagged fixture graphs returns tag-prefixed results
budget truncation works
missing global graph yields actionable error
description: Add `global query "<q>" [--tags a,b] [--budget N]` to tools/sma-graphify.mjs: load ~/.graphify/global-graph.json, optional tag filter, run the same match+traversal+budget pipeline, prefix each result node with its portfolio tag. Update global list/path help text.
title: Cross-project `global query` subcommand

acceptance_criteria: the named failure mode has a test that fails before the fix and passes after
module gate green
description: project-from-modules and the global union merge nodes by raw id; two modules exporting the same slug silently merge. Namespace node ids by module/tag at union time, preserve original id as a field, update path/explain to accept both. [P8.5 skeptic finding, 2026-07-10 round 1]
title: Make graph unions collision-safe with namespaced node identities

acceptance_criteria: the named failure mode has a test that fails before the fix and passes after

title: Content-address Graphify embedding indexes

acceptance_criteria: file runs directly under node with type stripping (no transpile step)

description: Rename tools/sma-graph-packets.mjs to .ts and add types using ONLY erasable syntax (type annotations, interfaces, type-only imports — no enums, no namespaces, no parameter properties) so Node type-stripping runs it directly with zero build step. Preserve behavior exactly: same exports, same CLI flags, same output. While converting, audit for silent catches and uninstrumented error paths — fix in place (structured stderr line with area+severity+hint). Update all importers' specifiers in the same change.
title: Convert sma-graph-packets.mjs to erasable-syntax TypeScript
